## Runtime.RuntimeIngredient.create() method

Factory method that auto-detects ingredient type and returns appropriate concrete class.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static create(context: IIngredientContext, id: IngredientId, ingredient: Ingredient): Result<AnyRuntimeIngredient>;
```
